sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94829" key="skiaqi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῐᾰθίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, an unknown fish (perh. <sense id="n94829.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σκίαινα</ref> </xr>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
